overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine 5 scene depicting a character in a green puffer jacket seated at an outdoor cafe table in a cyberpunk alleyway. The environment features a striking pink industrial building with Japanese karaoke signage and large ventilation fans opposite rusted metal scaffolding, while steam rises from street vents. The character performs idle animations including waving and simulated eating as the static camera observes from a third-person perspective.

agents.ego_description: seated on red stool at metal table, looking around the alleyway with subtle head movements and shifts in posture

notable_agents.action: standing near the pink building, partially obscured by steam emission

entered.detail: tall industrial building with bright pink facade, Japanese signage, and large circular ventilation fans
complex network of rusted pipes and metal walkways covering the right side building
small circular metal cafe table with the character seated at it
empty folding metal chair with dark seat padding
bright orange disposable cup sitting on the table
metal drainage grate covering the ground on the right side of the frame
white steam or smoke rising from vents near the ground on the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a static third-person view of a character seated at an outdoor cafe table in a narrow cyberpunk alley. The distinctive pink karaoke building with large ventilation fans dominates the left background, while rusted industrial scaffolding covers the right. Steam rises from street vents as the character sits idly, observing the surroundings, with an orange cup on the table and an empty chair nearby.

events.description: character raises right hand and waves in a greeting gesture toward something off-camera

agents.ego_description: raising right hand in a waving motion, holding the gesture briefly before lowering the arm

notable_agents.action: remaining stationary near the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from idle observation to active interaction, raising their right hand in a clear waving gesture. The cyberpunk alley setting remains unchanged with the pink industrial building and rusted scaffolding framing the scene, while steam continues to rise in the background.

events.description: character brings both hands together near face, simulating eating or drinking from the cup
character lowers hands and shifts to a more relaxed posture in the chair

agents.ego_description: mimicking eating or drinking motions with hands near the face, then lowering hands and adjusting seated position

segments.scene_description: The character engages in simulated eating or drinking behavior, bringing their hands together near the orange cup on the table. After several seconds of this interaction, they lower their hands and settle back into a relaxed posture, concluding the sequence of idle animations while the static camera maintains its fixed perspective on the cyberpunk alley setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static third-person perspective of a character in a cyberpunk alleyway as they transition from quiet observation to a series of idle social interactions. It begins with the character seated at an outdoor cafe table, framed by a striking pink karaoke building with large ventilation fans on one side and rusted industrial scaffolding on the other. As steam continues to rise from street vents in the background, the character shifts from a still posture to raise their right hand in a clear waving gesture. The scene then moves into a simulated eating or drinking motion as the character brings their hands together near an orange cup on the table. Finally, the character lowers their hands and settles back into a relaxed posture, concluding the sequence of movements within the unchanging industrial environment.
